post.summary:
Adds or updates SCAC overrides for specific carriers and integrations for the current user's company.
If an override exists with the same CompanyId, IntegrationId, and CarrierId, its SCAC value will be updated.
Otherwise, a new override will be created.

parameters.name: X-Integration-Key
parameters.description: Integration Key for accessing the API

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The list of SCAC overrides to add or update.

Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description:
API Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. 

 
                      Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.
                      

Example: 'Bearer 12345abcdef'
